26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @tsekuloski made this cool Hyrule shield from Zelda!
27 Man Tax: Greg Finley
"Is it safe?" - Dr. Christian Szell I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Sorry I'm late!
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: welp, my mom found out
item.description:
shes taking it bad
oh well, guess shes gonna have to file an illegal eviction in 30 days.
seeing as how evicting someone for being trans is illegal im interested to see how that playes out ill post an update in a few days as to her continued reaction and i am recording all calls with her and saving all forms or communication incase she goes through with it.

item.title: Huge Trump And Epstein Photograph Unveiled Outside Windsor Castle Ahead Of Trump's State Visit
item.description: A giant picture of Donald Trump and Jeffrey Epstein has been unveiled outside of Windsor Castle ahead of the US president's visit to the UK. Footage shared by political campaign group Everyone Hates Elon on Monday (15 September) shows several individuals unfurling the picture, which the group says was funded by donations from the British public. The group wrote: "Trump is coming to the UK to avoid the Epstein story. Unfortunately the British public just crowdfunded the world's biggest photo of Donald with convicted paedophile Jeffrey Epstein." The King is to host the US president and his wife, first lady Melania Trump, at Windsor Castle this week, where they will be treated with a ceremonial welcome and state banquet. #awesome #funny #current_affairs #british #mildly_interesting
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: The Death Spiral of Imgur (and Every App You Love)
item.description: I felt as Imgur’s wife of six years, it was time you heard about our marital problems. Every platform dies the same way, and you may have noticed right now that Imgur is likely deep in its own collapse. I sat down with my longtime friend TylerFromTheInternet to talk about “Ensh*ttification” - how apps hook us, bleed us, and then betray us. https://youtu.be/jfWcoJxo7C8 Want to know what has been going on here the past couple months? In the full video, we break down what’s happening to Imgur right now (13:27), the mass staff firings from MediaLabs (19:17), when Imgur literally broke (21:24), and how banning, blackouts, and even “The Boob Phase” (30:25) fit into the bigger picture. Along the way we hit Fark, iMDB, Reddit’s failures, and even why Mitt Romney somehow hates Tyler. It’s funny, furious, and maybe a little depressing - but if you’ve ever loved this site, you’ll want to see how it all fits together.
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: I think we could all use this
item.description: Been having a really shit couple of days/weeks/months/whatever, and videos like this are one of the things that helps me keep my mental state from collapsing some days. So I thought I'd share. Pulled it from National Geographic's IG for you: https://www.instagram.com/reel/DOd8ZzVgMxJ/
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1476 (bleak meme)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
A friend of mine who's a teacher is getting doxxed, fired, and banned from working in her town by the schoolboard courtesy of posting a "celebratory" Kirk meme. She is considering moving to another state. Welcome to rural MAGA Arizona.
Also, someone stole my laundry basket at the apartment laundry room. I had to carry all my laundry back to my apartment by hand. Who the fuck steals a laundry basket?! It wasn't sitting there for more than a half hour.
Also im worried about car repairs.
And how I'll survive in general. But whatever. I believed I'd have a job at the start of September so I stayed instead of moving to a city I hated or out of state so its my own idiot fault for trusting my body, brain, or both of them.
I saw that the county jail is hiring prison guards, I could just... sell my morals and values about human lives down the drain like so much of the rest of America.
Anyway.
Thanks I hate it. Didn't want it, didn't ask for it.
They've been in so long that not even the deaths of these people will halt the juggernaut. You'd need an asteroid at this point.
I feel so useless as a resistance person.
This is why I like both the Tides of History Podcast and the British History Podcast.
Sure, let me just fucking go out and find one at Walmart. And insurance won't cover it anyway.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Okay. Okay. Okay. Okay." [Kissing noises] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
